# Failing But Written

## Overview
The agent wrote this draft before returning a failing process status.

## Requirements
- REQ-001: Preserve a substantive draft artifact even when the agent exits non-zero.

## Acceptance criteria
- `roko prd draft new "failing but written"` exits successfully when this file exists.
